case.title: OHIO VALLEY ELECTRIC R. CO. v. HALL

opinion.h1: OHIO VALLEY ELECTRIC R. CO. v. HALL, 250 U.S. 649 (1919)
opinion.h2: OHIO VALLEY ELECTRIC RAILWAY COMPANY, plaintiff in error, v. J. B. HALL, as Administrator, etc. No. 761.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Dismissed with costs, on motion of counsel for the plaintiff in error.[ Ohio Valley Electric R Co v. Hall 250 U.S. 649 (1919) ]
